name: BofA / Merrill
ai_strategy_summary: The longest-running AI program in wealth management. Erica has surpassed 3 billion client interactions. Ask Merrill serves 23,000 advisors monthly with 10,000+ Q&A answers. BofA is investing $13B in technology in 2026, extending the most mature AI moat in the industry.
headline_initiative: Erica + Ask Merrill + Ask Private Bank

client_personalization.headline: Erica: 3 billion interactions, equivalent to 11,000 employees
client_personalization.detail: Bank of America's Erica virtual assistant has surpassed 3 billion client interactions as of August 2025, handling an estimated 1.5 million interactions per day. The system is equivalent to the work of 11,000 employees and handles everything from transaction queries to investment guidance.
client_personalization.jpm_implication: Erica's scale is unmatched in consumer banking AI. Chase's digital AI capabilities are directly competing with Erica for the same mass affluent clients.

advisor_productivity.headline: Ask Merrill: 23,000 advisors, 10,000+ Q&A answers per month
advisor_productivity.detail: Ask Merrill is a knowledge AI for Merrill's ~23,000 financial advisors, providing instant answers to client and compliance questions, product information, and investment guidance. Ask Private Bank provides a similar capability for the private banking team.
advisor_productivity.jpm_implication: BofA has deployed advisor AI at massive scale. JPM Wealth Management advisor tooling is in direct competition.

operations_compliance.headline: Erica handles transactions, wire tracking, and compliance documentation at scale
operations_compliance.detail: Erica manages a full range of operational client requests including wire tracking, transaction disputes, account management, and compliance documentation — at 1.5M interactions per day.
operations_compliance.jpm_implication: BofA's operational AI scale creates structural cost advantages. JPM operational efficiency through AI is a board-level priority.

client_acquisition.headline: AI-powered segment migration and next-best-action across 67M clients
client_acquisition.detail: BofA uses AI to identify segment migration opportunities across its 67 million consumer clients, using behavioral and transaction data to predict life events and recommend wealth management conversations.
client_acquisition.jpm_implication: BofA's AI-driven migration from banking to wealth management is a direct competitive threat to CWM and JPMWM acquisition pipeline.
